name: History tab shows past reviews from Supabase in a table
description: After at least one PR has been analyzed, switching to the History tab shows a table of past reviews with repo name, PR title, score, verdict badge, and date columns.

planSteps.description: Click the History tab button in the top navigation
The History tab becomes active and a table or list of past reviews is visible, or an empty state message 'No reviews yet' is shown if no reviews exist
If reviews exist, each row shows a repository name, a PR title truncated to fit, a colored score number, a verdict badge, and a formatted date
Click the Review tab to switch back
The Review tab becomes active and the PR input form is visible again
